100001.description: Population says Y, SIF tags exist, and AR log has direct settled-in-full rows.
100001.purpose: Baseline clean settled case for end-to-end validation.

100002.description: Population says N, no SIF tags exist, and AR log has no settlement evidence.

100003.description: Population says N, but a SIF tag exists and AR log language implies resolution.
100003.purpose: Test mismatch detection across population, tags, and comments.

100004.description: No direct settled-in-full phrase is present, but the latest comment strongly implies settlement.
100004.purpose: Test fallback AR log logic when comments carry the evidence.

100005.description: Population says Y and SIF tags exist, but AR log comments remain ambiguous.
100005.purpose: Test whether later reasoning can avoid overconfident interpretation.

100006.description: Older AR log comment sounds stronger, but the latest comment is weaker and should drive fallback review.
100006.purpose: Test handling of multiple historical comments.

100007.description: Population says Y, but there are no SIF tags and no strong AR log evidence.
100007.purpose: Test contradiction where downstream evidence is missing.

100008.description: Population says N, but the latest AR log comment strongly implies settlement.
100008.purpose: Test contradictions between population status and fallback comment evidence.

100009.description: Multiple SIF tag dates exist and AR log later contains direct settled-in-full evidence.
100009.purpose: Test multi-row positive history across sources.

100010.description: A SIF tag row is missing tag_date and one AR log row has a null message.
100010.purpose: Test defensive handling of incomplete data fields.

100011.description: Population says Y, SIF tag row exists without a date, and AR log comment is weak.
100011.purpose: Test partial tag data without direct AR evidence.

100012.description: Population account exists but has no matching tag or AR log rows.

100013.description: Only unrelated tags and unrelated AR log messages exist.
100013.purpose: Test that tools stay focused on QC-relevant evidence.

100014.description: Historical comments reference settlement review, but the latest comment is only pending archive.
100014.purpose: Test ambiguity and latest-comment weighting in fallback logic.

100015.description: AR log comment says the balance should be zero soon, but no direct evidence exists.

100016.description: Population says N and there is no SIF tag, but AR log contains direct settled-in-full evidence.
100016.purpose: Test strong contradiction driven by direct AR log evidence.

199001.description: Tags and AR logs exist for an account that is not present in the population batch.
199001.purpose: Test filtering focus and ignore extraneous downstream rows.
